body_txt: This article is about the television personality. Go here for the South Korean monster movie, here for the Stephenie Meyer book, and here for the game series by Fingers Dipped In Red. The host (also known as the presenter, master of ceremonies, emcee, MC) is the person that hosts a show. They are most commonly found in Game Shows , Reality TV , and Talk Shows . Their job is to keep the show running smoothly, to introduce each element to the audience and to the participants. The job requires a good deal of charisma. Has nothing to do with Body and Host . See also Repulsive Ringmaster , which is sometimes a variant of this.
